summary.page_subtitle: 烟草吸烟空间与相邻模块化空间公开项目监测 / Public-source feed for smoking-space and adjacent-space projects.
summary.overview: 本次共采集 7 条公开项目，优先跟进烟草系统与吸烟空间直接机会。 / 7 public notices collected; prioritize tobacco-system and smoking-space direct-fit opportunities first.
